meta.name: Startup Funding + Local Gateway + Simulation E2E (Demo)
meta.notes: Demo intent: Singabldr calls Local Gateway only (/api/llm/*). Replace simulationId with a real simulation_id in your simulation backend.

steps.message: Demo: Local Gateway is the only LLM calling surface; Singabldr routes via /api/llm/*.
I want to bootstrap with AI EdTech, should I take Venture Debts, SME grants?

steps.status: 🤖 Calling GPT-5.4 nano (OpenAI) via Local Gateway...

steps.snippet: Optimist: Venture debt could accelerate runway if your cashflow is predictable.
Skeptic: SME grants are safer, but timelines and compliance can slow product iteration.
Policy: Match funding terms to your risk controls; educational only—verify with qualified advisors.
Builder: Pre-revenue → start with grants + milestones; add debt only after traction.
Neutral: Compare total cost of capital (fees, risk-adjusted return, opportunity cost), not just time-to-cash.

steps.message: Neutral: I’d compare total cost of capital, not just how fast money arrives.
Agreed—compare total cost of capital (interest/fees, risk-adjusted return, opportunity cost), not only time-to-cash. Share the two options and I’ll help structure a simple comparison checklist.
E2E orchestration: start → stream → stop (Simulation Gateway) from chat commands
Swarm UI streaming: citizens reacting to simulation events.
Chain of Bubbles: pin + drag a bubble, then ➕ Add to Chat to append replies onto the bubble.
Demo complete. (Security: no client-side direct OpenAI calls; Gateway is the single LLM surface.)
